summary: Use DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', ORDER_DATE) for month bucketing
Simplify casts by casting directly to numeric types
Use explicit GROUP BY column names instead of positional indexes

previous_definition:
create or replace view VW_MONTHLY_REVENUE_SUMMARY(
	REVENUE_MONTH,
	PRODUCT_CATEGORY,
	CUSTOMER_REGION,
	CHANNEL,
	TOTAL_REVENUE,
	TOTAL_GROSS,
	ORDER_COUNT,
	AVG_DISCOUNT
) as
SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT 
        TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(ORDER_DATE), 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM') AS REVENUE_MONTH,
        PRODUCT_CATEGORY,
        CUSTOMER_REGION,
        CHANNEL,
        SUM(CAST(CAST(NET_AMOUNT AS VARCHAR) AS FLOAT)) AS TOTAL_REVENUE,
        SUM(CAST(CAST(GROSS_AMOUNT AS VARCHAR) AS FLOAT)) AS TOTAL_GROSS,
        COUNT(*) AS ORDER_COUNT,
        AVG(CAST(CAST(DISCOUNT_PCT AS VARCHAR) AS NUMBER)) AS AVG_DISCOUNT
    FROM HAFID_OPTIM_CLONE_1.PIPELINE_DWH.FACT_SALES
    WHERE YEAR(ORDER_DATE) >= 2020
      AND STATUS != 'cancelled'
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
) sub
WHERE TOTAL_REVENUE > 0
ORDER BY REVENUE_MONTH DESC;
executed_sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW HAFID_OPTIM_CLONE_1.PIPELINE_MART.VW_MONTHLY_REVENUE_SUMMARY AS
SELECT
    sub.REVENUE_MONTH,
    sub.PRODUCT_CATEGORY,
    sub.CUSTOMER_REGION,
    sub.CHANNEL,
    sub.TOTAL_REVENUE,
    sub.TOTAL_GROSS,
    sub.ORDER_COUNT,
    sub.AVG_DISCOUNT
FROM (
    SELECT
        /* Bucket orders by calendar month (YYYY-MM) */
        TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', ORDER_DATE), 'YYYY-MM') AS REVENUE_MONTH,
        PRODUCT_CATEGORY,
        CUSTOMER_REGION,
        CHANNEL,

        /* Cast directly to numeric; assume FACT_SALES columns are numeric-compatible */
        SUM(NET_AMOUNT)::FLOAT    AS TOTAL_REVENUE,
        SUM(GROSS_AMOUNT)::FLOAT  AS TOTAL_GROSS,
        COUNT(*)                  AS ORDER_COUNT,
        AVG(DISCOUNT_PCT)::NUMBER AS AVG_DISCOUNT
    FROM HAFID_OPTIM_CLONE_1.PIPELINE_DWH.FACT_SALES
    WHERE
        YEAR(ORDER_DATE) >= 2020
        AND STATUS <> 'cancelled'
    GROUP BY
        REVENUE_MONTH,
        PRODUCT_CATEGORY,
        CUSTOMER_REGION,
        CHANNEL
) sub
WHERE sub.TOTAL_REVENUE > 0
ORDER BY sub.REVENUE_MONTH DESC
